sourcePrompt: A small Vietnamese Buddhist pagoda in the Mahayana style, about six meters square under roughly eight meters of stacked roof. Two tiers of green glazed-tile roofs with dramatically upturned eave corners and ornamental ridge finials, red-lacquered columns framing an open raised entrance up a short flight of steps, and white stucco side walls. Low-poly, blocky, modular; simple readable silhouette.
